name: Oxylus
description: With 'Scan Aquatic Lifeforms' and 'Scan Matter' as default Precepts, Oxylus was designed to assist in Search-and-Rescue operations through the harsh landscape around The Orb Vallis. Oxylus also comes with a Multron rifle.

components.name: Axidrol Alloy
components.description:
A compound formed from Axidite.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: With 'Scan Aquatic Lifeforms' and 'Scan Matter' as default Precepts, Oxylus was designed to assist in Search-and-Rescue operations through the harsh landscape around The Orb Vallis. Oxylus also comes with a Multron rifle.

components.name: Goblite Tears
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

components.name: Longwinder Lathe Coagulant
components.description:
A liquid that mixes with coolant fluid to produce a resilient gel that repairs leaks.

Source: Dismantled from Longwinder servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Longwinder in Orb Vallis lake hotspots during Warm weather.

components.name: Scrap
components.description:
A sample of sprockets, gyros and wires.

Source: Dismantled from all Orb Vallis servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus).

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Oxylus’ Botanize scans not costing charges.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.additions:
Added a new Precept Mod for Oxylus available from Simaris!
Oxylus Sentinel will scan plants within 20m over 5s. This consumes Codex Scanner charges.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error with Oxylus' Scan Aquatic Lifeforms Precept.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.3 + 24.1.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Oxylus Lifeform precept not showing Kubrodon points.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: In an effort to reduce the inventory duplication clutter that came with the individual Sentinel attack Precept Mods, Wyrm, Wyrm Prime, Carrier, Carrier Prime, Dethcube, Taxon, and the newest Oxylus now come with the “Assault Mode” Mod: “Sentinel will attack first visible enemy within an area” (*final stats available in game).
